     Shared rules for humans and AI agents live in AGENTS.md. -->

## How to verify

<!-- Steps a reviewer can follow to see it working (or the tests that cover it). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, and `pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] Scoped to one task, with a [conventional-commit](https://www.conventionalcommits.org) title (`feat(desktop): …`, `fix(core): …`)
- [ ] No secrets or personal data in code, tests, or fixtures
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (README / CHANGELOG / plan)
